headlines.description: — James Harden scored a playoff-best 30 points and Donovan Mitchell had 21, helping the Cleveland Cavaliers come back from a nine-point deficit late in regulation and beat the
headlines.shortLinkText: James Harden scores 30 and Cavaliers rally past Pistons 117-113 in OT for 3-2 series lead
